## Problem

<!-- What problem does this change solve? -->

## Scope

<!-- Summarize the chosen approach and what is intentionally out of scope. -->

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm build` (for TypeScript or UI changes)
- [ ] `pnpm x:self-test` (for executor changes)
- [ ] `pnpm agency:demo` (for agency/runtime changes)
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Not applicable checks are explained below

Validation notes:

<!-- Include focused test output, manual steps, or screenshots. -->

## Trust and data review

- [ ] Fixtures are synthetic and explicitly labelled.
- [ ] No credentials, cookies, browser storage, private repository content, or unpublished copy are included.
- [ ] Generated, estimated, fixture, and verified values remain distinguishable.
- [ ] Publishing and receipt behavior is unchanged, or the change is explained below.

## Documentation and compatibility

- [ ] User-facing commands, schemas, and behavior are documented.
- [ ] Breaking changes or migrations are called out.

## Related issues

<!-- Use "Closes #123" when applicable. -->
